content: No new EarnedConstraint crystallized this cycle -- Checker's one 'note' finding (self-referential 00-deps.json gap) is a single occurrence, not a 3+ recurrence, so per earned-constraints.md's own rule it stays an open hypothesis, not an EC.

open_hypothesis: clarify in orchestrator-role/SKILL.md step 1 or trail-schema.md whether a cycle whose own Make edits the 00-deps.json requirement into existence is itself exempt from producing one, or whether orchestrator should always write a (possibly trivial) 00-deps.json going forward regardless of what the cycle's true_intent is. Left unresolved deliberately -- worth folding into a future small cycle rather than deciding unilaterally here.

Trail e5e3107f's second staged item, proposed-EC-010, documents (but does not close) the 2 remaining stale 'sibling pmcro-skills repo' references in cto/skills/domain-scope/SKILL.md and ceo/commands/evolve-colony.md. Those remain open and unfixed after this cycle -- EC-010 now exists precisely so a future cleanup pass is checked against grep-verification, not so this cycle fixes them retroactively.
